title: Runic
description: A simple texture pack that replaces the default minecraft font with illager runes from minecraft dungeons.
body:
![The text "runic" in illager runes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/466967c5fc660b80ae2b5e653d5c9f5103bc1bb3_0.webp)
## RUNIC
#### This is a simple texture pack that replaces the default ASCII characters with the illager runes from minecraft dungeons
---
<details>
